prompt_text:
### Demographics: 73-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 93.5 kg; Height 173.7 cm; BMI 31.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.9%; 9 months ago 6.6%; 6 months ago 6.8%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 151mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 149mg/dL; 3 months ago 145mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 96.3kg; 9 months ago 94.7kg; 6 months ago 92.1kg; 3 months ago 93.7kg; current 93.5kg), Height (12 months ago 173.7cm; 9 months ago 173.7cm; 6 months ago 173.7cm; 3 months ago 173.7cm; current 173.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 81mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 79U/L; 9 months ago 81U/L; 6 months ago 81U/L; 3 months ago 82U/L; current 81U/L), AST (12 months ago 66U/L; 9 months ago 61U/L; 6 months ago 60U/L; 3 months ago 67U/L; current 61U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 1126mg/g; 9 months ago 900mg/g; 6 months ago 820mg/g; 3 months ago 864mg/g; current 967mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 98mg/dL; 9 months ago 99mg/dL; 6 months ago 93mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 125mg/dL; 9 months ago 143mg/dL; 6 months ago 139mg/dL; 3 months ago 145mg/dL; current 133mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
